results.name: has_cta
results.detail: button must be "Download Vibe Health →" + highlighted title

results.name: follows_json_schema
results.detail: key, theme not in health/looksmax, bg_prompts

rationales.hook_strength: 'Matters more, not less' is a mild inversion but not sharp enough to stop a scroll — needs a specific number or counterintuitive stat to bite.
rationales.clarity: Every slide is one idea, labeled, actionable, and short — easy to follow at a glance.
rationales.audience_fit: The 20–35 tired-by-3pm audience isn't thinking about post-50 muscle loss yet — this deck speaks to a 45–65 demographic, not the core target.
rationales.novelty: 'Lift twice a week, progressive overload, protect your independence' is standard fitness advice with no fresh angle or surprising detail.
rationales.brand_fit: Claims are properly hedged, voice stays plain and direct, and the CTA connects naturally to the health score — no cringe.
rationales.predicted_performance: Audience mismatch will hurt saves; the people most likely to save this aren't the people the account is built to reach.
